Stream.title: Stream Metadata
Stream.description: Holds information about the current live stream including title, active state, and overlay data.

isActive.description: Whether the stream is currently live

overlayText.description: Optional text to display as an overlay

showCamera.description: Whether the camera overlay is enabled

Message.title: Chat Message
Message.description: A message sent in the stream chat.

userId.description: The ID of the user who sent it

userName.description: The display name of the sender

userAvatar.description: The photo URL of the sender

Viewer.title: Viewer Heartbeat
Viewer.description: Tracks individual session activity to calculate live viewer counts.
